label: 第149話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.127
summary_short: 真依は双子である自分が真希の力を制限していると告げ、自らの命と引き換えに刀を作る。呪力を完全に失った真希は、甚爾と同質の肉体を得て扇を倒す。
summary_full: 扇は瀕死の真希と真依を、二級以下の呪霊が満ちる訓練・懲罰部屋へ投げ込む。海辺の心象世界で真依は、一卵性双生児は呪術上同一人物とみなされ、自分が呪力を持つ限り真希の天与呪縛も完成しないと説明する。真依は構築術式で命と引き換えに一本の刀を作り、真希の呪力をすべて持って去る。覚醒した真希は甚爾と同質の肉体で呪霊を一掃し、恐怖した扇が焦眉之赳を発動する前に首を両断する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Defeated and bleeding out, both 真希 and 真依 have been severely injured and left to die by their father. Fortunately, 真依 is left conscious and she always figured this would happen one day. 真依 understands that in jujutsu , she and 真希 are one, and she must make a drastic decision to ensure her beloved twin sister lives on.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 扇 leaves his injured daughters to be eaten by 呪霊. 扇 drags his twin daughters' bleeding bodies down a corridor toward an unmarked room with a large opening. Having sliced both of them himself, 扇 thoughtlessly leaves a trail of their blood behind him as he explains his victory. 真希 lost to her father because she stepped in close and treated her opponent like a swordsman and not a sorcerer . 扇 believes he's not to be judged by those who are no good and considers 真希 to be completely worthless. He repeats that he did not become head of the clan because of the quality of his children. 直毘人 's 投射呪法 technique doesn't have much of a history outside of passing it down to 直哉 , so this was not a determining factor in the despite. The only difference between them was how strong their children turned out to be. 真依 makes certain that 真希 lives on. 扇 tells his daughters that children must not hold back their parents and throws them down a flight of stairs into a large room. He explains this area is for training and discipline. Countless grade 2 and lower 呪霊 are kept there that will eat the twins as soon as 扇 leaves. He mocks 真希 and claims her Heavenly Restriction is nothing special compared to other sorcerers who train and reinforce their muscles with 呪力 every day. The father turns his back on his daughters and says farewell to the stains on his life one final time. Before the curses move in, 真依 is able to sit up and puts 真希's head on her lap before feeling for a heartbeat. She feels miraculously 真希's heart beating and notes how tough her twin is. 真依 suspected this would happen someday and is ready to do what's necessary. She opens 真希's mouth and says this sucks before breathing into it, resuscitating her sister. 真希 gets a breath of new life and awakens in a dream space somewhere on a beach as if she's been rescued from drowning. She's laying next to 真依, who explains that she's going to use her 構築術式 technique to make something and then die from the strain due to her injuries. 真依 gets up from the sand and walks into the water while saying goodbye and wishing her twin good luck. " You are me... and I am you. " This greatly confuses 真希, who gets up and tries to follow 真依, begging her sister to come back. 真依 explains that she knew for a while that twins are a bad omen for sorcerers. To gain, one must give, and in that way, suffering has made them both stronger. However, that rule doesn't apply to twins because jujutsu treats them as one individual. Even if 真希 wants to get stronger, she can't because 真依 doesn't and 真依 possesses the 術式 . As long as 真依 is around, 真希 cannot fully develop. 真希 says that she understands so that 真依 will stop walking away. She doesn't want to lose her sister and runs into the water after 真依, asking her again to come back. 真依 extends her hand to leave only one thing and tells 真希 to throw the rest away. 真依 will take away all the 呪力 between them with her as she dies. In return, she asks 真希 to promise her one thing: " destroy everything ". 真希 takes a small reed from her sister's hand and reflects on them as small children, momentarily taking them back to being happy little girls again. Still in her arms, 真希 realizes 真依 tragically sacrificed herself. In the next moment, 真希 returns to reality and notices she's holding a sword handle instead of a reed. She's in the arms of her sister, who has tragically toppled over with no more life left in her body. Overwhelmed with guilt and sorrow, 真希 cries and tells 真依 to wake up as 呪霊 approach them from every side. While 扇 is walking away, he notices something is amiss and turns around out of concern. All of the 呪霊 are suddenly exorcised, confusing 扇 as their presences disappear. He readies his katana and sees 真希 in the shadows of the doorway gently putting 真依's body down. 扇's body remembers a certain fear his mind has tried long and hard to forget. 真希 emerges from the shadows and reminds him of none other than the only other warrior to possess no 呪力, 禪院甚爾 . Struck with a jolt of fear, 扇's eyes open wide and he begins to sweat. He immediately activates his innate technique, 焦眉之赳 , coating his katana's broken blade in scorching flames that blaze a circle around him. 真希 fulfilling her promise to destroy everything for 真依, starting with their father. With his scorching blade pointed at 真希, 扇 threatens to burn his worthless child to the bone in a fight to the death, but 真希 effortlessly bisects his head while walking past him using a slash so fast he never even saw it coming. 真希 stops after her father's defeated body falls to the ground dead. She looks at the last gift 真依 gave her and remembers the birds flying over the beach. Ready to keep her promise, 真希 grips the cursed tool in her hand and tells 真依 it's time to get started.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 禪院真希 禪院真依 禪院扇 禪院直毘人 (回想) 禪院直哉 (回想) 伏黒甚爾 (回想)
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 禪院真希 vs. 禪院扇 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 釈魂刀 禪院真依の術式 構築術式 禪院扇の術式 焦眉之赳

key_events_verified_phase8: 真希と真依が訓練・懲罰部屋へ投げ込まれる
真依が双子と天与呪縛の関係を説明する
真依が命と引き換えに刀を作る
真依が死亡し真希の呪力が完全に失われる
覚醒した真希が扇を殺す
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
